title: Pillager Half-Timbered Cottage Dungeon
description: Half-Timbered Cottage that turns Pillager into trap-filled complexes with tactical combat and exclusive loot.
body:
Pillager Half-Timbered Cottage Dungeon expands the Minecraft world by turning Pillager cottages into compact medieval dungeons focused on structured exploration and combat, featuring handcrafted interiors, hidden rooms, traps, and layered layouts that encourage careful progression, tense encounters, and rewarding loot, while staying faithful to the vanilla style and balancing risk and reward within a smaller, more contained structure.
